sentences.arabic: غَيَّرَتِ الْحَوْسَبَةُ السَّحابِيَّةُ طَرِيقَةَ تَخْزِينِ الْبَياناتِ وَالْوُصُولِ إِلَيْها مِنْ أَيِّ مَكانٍ فِي الْعالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Računarstvo u oblaku promijenilo je način pohranjivanja podataka i pristupanja istima s bilo kojeg mjesta na svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: Cloud computing has changed the way data is stored and accessed from anywhere in the world.

sentences.arabic: تُمَكِّنُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةُ الْفِرَقَ مِنْ تَبادُلِ الْمَلَفَّاتِ وَالتَّعاوُنِ فِي الْمَشارِيعِ بِشَكْلٍ لَحْظِيٍّ وَفَعَّالٍ.
sentences.translation: Ova tehnologija omogućava timovima da razmjenjuju datoteke i sarađuju na projektima trenutno i efikasno.
sentences.translationEn: This technology enables teams to exchange files and collaborate on projects instantaneously and effectively.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ تَعُدِ الشَّرِكاتُ بِحاجَةٍ إِلَى خَوادِمَ ضَخْمَةٍ وَمُكْلِفَةٍ داخِلَ مَقَرَّاتِها بِفَضْلِ الْبِنْيَةِ التَّحْتِيَّةِ السَّحابِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kompanije više nemaju potrebu za ogromnim i skupim serverima unutar svojih sjedišta zahvaljujući infrastrukturi u oblaku.
sentences.translationEn: Companies no longer need massive and expensive servers inside their premises thanks to cloud infrastructure.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، يَبْقَى التَّحَدِّي الْأَكْبَرُ هُوَ ضَمانُ أَمْنِ هَذِهِ الْبَياناتِ ضِدَّ الِاخْتِراقاتِ الْمُحْتَمَلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, najveći izazov ostaje osiguranje sigurnosti tih podataka od potencijalnih upada.
sentences.translationEn: However, the biggest challenge remains ensuring the security of this data against potential breaches.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِانْتِقالَ إِلَى السَّحابَةِ يُعَدُّ خُطْوَةً جَوْهَرِيَّةً نَحْوَ التَّحَوُّلِ الرَّقْمِيِّ الشَّامِلِ لِلْمُؤَسَّساتِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prelazak na oblak smatra se suštinskim korakom ka sveobuhvatnoj digitalnoj transformaciji modernih institucija.
sentences.translationEn: Moving to the cloud is a fundamental step toward the comprehensive digital transformation of modern institutions.
